source: AUC 2017-2018 academic catalog program page and linked core curriculum page
notes: Course codes are normalized to the current catalog code shown to the right of the slash in dual-code labels such as CSCE 106/1001 -> CSCE1001.
Semester placement by numbered term is not published on the AUC program page, so semester is left empty and semesterAvailability is derived from each course's When Offered field.

General Electives are listed as 3-15 credits on the program page, but the seed uses 9 credits because 132 total degree credits minus 33 core curriculum credits, 60 computer science requirement credits, and 30 collateral credits leaves 9 credits.

Only curriculum-listed courses are emitted in the seed. Prerequisite links that point to external or preparatory courses outside the curriculum are preserved in prerequisiteText but omitted from prerequisite mappings.
